_exempt: <!-- PRIMARY-SOURCE-EXEMPT: reason=QA cert fixture grounded in Wildberger (2005) Divine Proportions ISBN 978-0-9757492-0-8 (Fermat subfamily I=|C-F|=1) and Hardy+Wright (2008) ISBN 978-0-19-921986-5 Ch.III (Pell equation, Ford circles). -->
description: Fermat chain (I=1, Pell solutions): (1,1),(3,2),(7,5),(17,12). |b^2-2e^2|=1 for all; consecutive Farey-adjacent. Converges to cusp sqrt(2). See cert [289].
